metadata.name: Manage a Management of Change (MOC) Request

description: An engineer proposes changing a pipe's material of construction. An MOC must be created to assess the safety and environmental impact.

nodes.task_description: Create a new MOC request, detailing the proposed change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully initiates the MOC record.

nodes.task_description: Route the MOC to the EHS department for a formal hazard review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assigns the MOC to the EHS manager for review and approval.

nodes.task_description: After EHS review, document any required safety actions (e.g., 'Update P&ID diagram') before the MOC can be fully approved.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adds the required actions to the MOC record based on the EHS review.
